policy: English source posts must be editorially approved before any localized publish.

high.when: After Wave 1 and Wave 2 English posts pass medical accuracy and internal link QA.
high.notes: Core commercial locales. Use professional medical translators, not raw machine output.

medium.when: After high-tier backlog is stable in Search Console and support load is acceptable.
medium.notes: Tagalog and Hindi: partial UI tier today. Label translated posts honestly if overlay copy is incomplete.

deferred.when: Only with native clinical localization budget and hreflang audit.
deferred.notes: Do not bulk machine-translate pathophysiology or medication content without review.

databaseFlags.futureVariants: Set translationGroupId identical across locales; point canonicalPostId from variant to approved English row when ready.
